symptoms: Error log: 'QueuePool limit overflow, max_overflow 0 current overflow 20'
Order creation success rate fell from 99.9% to 12% within 8 minutes of deploy
DB connection wait p99 jumped from 2 ms to 48 000 ms
inventory-service receiving 11× its normal request volume
Kubernetes pod restarts on order-service every ~4 minutes (liveness probe)
hypotheses_tested: Connection pool exhaustion due to concurrent connections
confirmed_root_cause: Each cart with N items now opens N concurrent DB connections in inventory-service, causing connection pool exhaustion due to a missing connection.close() in the error path
resolution_action: Hotfix deployed: added finally: conn.close() in inventory_client.py, batched all per-item lookups into a single SELECT ... WHERE id IN (...) query, and increased pool size to 50 as temporary buffer
